## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and operational improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is expanding team support: Carrie joins as managing editor, focusing on content strategy and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Operational improvements: Multiple team members will ensure continuity and prevent single-point-of-failure issues](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Content production: 162 articles published, 12 ready for review, 8 in editing; aiming to increase backlog](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Schema markup implementation planned to improve search visibility, particularly for FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Operational Improvements

  - [Carrie joining as managing editor, focusing on content strategy and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Multiple team members (Sadira, Carrie, Prateek) will provide backup and diverse expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Addressing previous operational glitches to ensure smooth workflow even when team members are unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

### Content Production and Review

  - [7 articles published this week, total now 162](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [12 articles ready for review (8 new, 2 refresh, 2 content enrichments)](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [8 articles currently being edited by Carrie](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Jessica emphasized need for larger backlog of ready-to-review articles](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Slight decrease in overall blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [New content maintaining steady traffic levels](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Small dip in refresh content performance](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Top-performing categories: texting, enterprise-related, and translations](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Steady growth in backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [LLM traffic: ChatGPT dominates (97% in last 28 days), surprising shift from previous diversity](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Schema Markup Implementation

  - [Plan to add schema markup for improved search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Requires Next.js plugin and developer support for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Will focus on FAQ schema to appear in People Also Ask boxes and AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Process: Install plugin, create dynamic JavaScript file, add to page header](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Some new content generating zero clicks; team to broaden narrow topics](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Plan to create 6-month performance report in two weeks, detailing learnings and future strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Focus on systematic approach to content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

### Ongoing Action Items

  - [Working on cannibalization, keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Airtable class restructuring (week by week)](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Double-checking 404 links](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Manual indexing of new content](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

  - [GrowthX team to continue adding FAQs to new articles for future schema implementation](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)

  - [Sadira to complete manual indexing of remaining article](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Continue working on increasing backlog of ready-to-review articles](https://fathom.video/share/6rvRzHr_ea7CZz_oA1uPFScMtwXyZHBD?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
